queue.label: Create full usePollingFetch hook with dedup, retry, and visibility
queue.prompt: Create ~/Projects/command-center/src/hooks/usePollingFetch.js. Create the hooks directory if needed. Full implementation: function usePollingFetch(url, interval, options={}) where options has { transform, retry: 2, onError, enabled: true, deps: [] }. Returns { data, error, isLoading, isRefreshing, lastUpdated, refetch }. Use useEffect with setTimeout-based scheduling (not setInterval). Use AbortController for deduplication. Skip fetch when document.hidden. Retry failed fetches up to 2 times with exponential backoff. Keep stale data on error. Auto-cleanup on unmount. refetch is a stable useCallback. After creating the file, run `npm run build` from ~/Projects/command-center/ and verify zero errors.

queue.label: Migrate WorkQueue.jsx and GatewayStatus.jsx to usePollingFetch
queue.prompt: Migrate two components in ~/Projects/command-center/src/components/widgets/ to use usePollingFetch from src/hooks/usePollingFetch.js: (1) WorkQueue.jsx - replace the 3 separate polling useEffects (queue every 10s, log every 10s, cron every 30s) with 3 usePollingFetch calls. Keep the existing rendering and sorting logic. (2) GatewayStatus.jsx - replace manual polling with usePollingFetch at 30s interval. Keep existing display JSX. After both changes, run `npm run build` and verify zero errors.

queue.label: Add dnd-kit drag-and-drop layer to Kanban
queue.prompt: Refactor ~/Projects/command-center/src/components/widgets/Kanban.jsx to use @dnd-kit/core and @dnd-kit/sortable. Already installed. Add DndContext with sensors (PointerSensor 6px, TouchSensor 180ms/8px, KeyboardSensor with sortableKeyboardCoordinates), collisionDetection=closestCorners. After changes, run `npm run build` and verify zero errors.

queue.label: Extract Clock into own component + memoize arrays
queue.prompt: In ~/Projects/command-center/src/App.jsx: (1) Move the DAYS and MONTHS arrays to module scope (above the component). Place the <Clock/> component where the old clock JSX was. (3) Split into two intervals: 1000ms for the time, 60000ms for the date. Cleanup both. After changes, run `npm run build` and verify zero errors.
